title: ICAI CA Intermediate Exams: May 2026 Dates Rescheduled!
content:
# ICAI CA Intermediate Exams: May 2026 Dates Rescheduled!

Ek important update hai CA Intermediate students ke liye! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Chartered Accountants Intermediate Examination ki dates mein thoda बदलाव kiya hai. Ye announcement April 6, 2026, ko jaari kiya gaya hai.

**Kya hain Naye Dates?**

*   **Old Start Date:** May 3, 2026
*   **New Start Date:** May 5, 2026
*   **Group I Examinations:** May 5, 7, aur 9, 2026 ko honge.
*   **Group II Examinations:** May 11, 13, aur 15, 2026 ko honge.
*   **Exam Timings:** 2 PM to 5 PM (IST) rahenge, inme koi change nahi hai.
*   Yeh announcement earlier notification No. 13-CA(EXAM)/MAY/2026 dated December 12, 2025, ko partially modify karta hai.
*   **No Change for Other Exams:** Foundation, Final, aur Post Qualification Course (PQC) examinations ke schedules mein koi badlav nahi kiya gaya hai.

Toh, students, apne study plans accordingly adjust kar lein!

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=23171)

*Published on: 8 April 2026*
